In the second installment of Votes and Verdicts’ three-part housing affordability miniseries, Bloomberg Intelligence editor Michael Sasso speaks with Erica Adelberg, BI senior mortgage-backed securities analyst, and Phillip Millman, founder of Bell Boulevard Consulting and a former Federal Housing Finance Agency executive. They discuss why mortgage rates have been

title: Waste Industry Is Recession-Resilient: Republic Services
title_cn: 废物处理行业具有抵御衰退的能力：Republic Services
summary: Republic Services CEO Jon Vander Ark joined Bloomberg Open Interest to break down why the waste industry thrives even in downturns. He calls it “recession-resilient” with strong margins. He reveals a major $500M bet on advanced recycling that turns plastic back into new bottles. Plus, why AI will be the true game-changer for the future of waste management. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: US Stocks Near Record High as Chip Stocks Roar, Payrolls Beat
title_cn: 芯片股飙升、就业数据强劲，美国股市接近历史新高
summary: US stocks were on track for a record closing high, buoyed by semiconductor stocks, strong monthly payrolls figures and a US-Iran ceasefire that appeared intact even with overnight clashes near the Strait of Hormuz.

title: Stellantis Deal Gives China’s Leapmotor Plant, EV in Europe

summary: Nigerian assets are rallying across stocks, bonds and the currency as investor confidence builds in President Bola Tinubu’s economic agenda.

title: How Gen Z Is Changing Charity
title_cn: Z 世代如何改变慈善事业
summary: Gen Z is redefining generosity according to GoFundMe. The CEO Tim Cadogan reveals that young people aren’t just talking about change—they’re giving more than any other generation, driven by social connection, identity, and digital sharing. And personal giving is actually boosting nonprofits, not hurting them. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Stock Strength Driven by Earnings, Not Economy: Santos
title_cn: 桑托斯：股票走强是由盈利而非经济驱动的
summary: The economy is being propped up by AI says JPMorgan’s Gabriela Santos. She joined Bloomberg Open Interest to explain why the labor market is weaker than headlines suggest, how the AI trade has shifted beyond big tech, and why markets keep rallying despite global chaos. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Oil Holds Steady as US Sticks to Truce Even as Hostilities Mount

summary: Oil held steady on Friday as US President Donald Trump said that a ceasefire with Iran still held despite renewed clashes, sustaining hopes a deal may be struck.

title: How NFL Legend Steve Young Built a $10 Billion Fund
title_cn: NFL 传奇人物 Steve Young 如何建立 100 亿美元的基金
summary: Alex Rodriguez and Jason Kelly sit down with three-time Super Bowl champion Steve Young to discuss the challenges faced and lessons learned on his journey from the NFL to managing a $10 billion fund. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: US Says Iran Should Give Answer Friday as Clashes Raise Tensions

title: Bloomberg Surveillance 5/8/2026
title_cn: 彭博社监测 2026 年 5 月 8 日
summary: Jonathan Ferro, Lisa Abramowicz and Annmarie Hordern speak daily with leaders and decision makers from Wall Street to Washington and beyond. No other program better positions investors and executives for the trading day. (Source: Bloomberg)

title_cn: Itau Asset 的 Serra 预计巴西大选后将大幅降息
summary: The bulk of interest-rate cuts in Brazil is likely to come only after October elections, according to former Central Bank director Bruno Serra.

summary: Compass Gas e Energia SA’s shareholders raised 3.2 billion reais ($650 million) in the first initial public offering in Brazil in almost five years.

title: University College London Professor on the Cons of Hiring Consultants

summary:
Why do governments use consultants and why has that weakened businesses and economies?

University College London Professor Mariana Mazzucato joins Tracy Alloway and Joe Weisenthal on the Odd Lots podcast to discuss why governments' use of consultants often leads to inefficiencies and civic failures. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Treasuries Gain After Mixed Jobs Data Cements Bets on Steady Fed

summary: Treasuries gained after a mixed batch of US employment data cemented the market’s view that the Federal Reserve will be cautious to change monetary policy.

summary: Wall Street is growing more convinced that shipping through the Strait of Hormuz will remain impaired into the second half of the year, highlighting expectations for a longer-lasting supply shock.

title_cn: 冈拉克在美国债务重组中押注风险不大
summary: DoubleLine Capital’s Jeffrey Gundlach is repositioning some of his funds for the extreme scenario that the US government could choose to restructure its debt in response to a potential future recession.

title_cn: 以下是美国四月份就业报告的主要要点
summary: Here are the key takeaways from the US employment report for April, released Friday:

title: Gold Rises as Buying Interest Counters Concern Over Hormuz Clash
title_cn: 买盘兴趣平息对霍尔木兹冲突的担忧，金价上涨
summary: Gold rose, as signs of buying interest emerged even as fresh clashes in the Middle East threatened to fracture a fragile ceasefire.

title: Online Mob Fuels 6,000% Stock Rally in Obscure SpaceX Rival
title_cn: 在线暴民助推默默无闻的 SpaceX 竞争对手股价上涨 6,000%
summary: Championed by a guru known simply as the Kook, the satellite company AST has become one of the world's most expensive stocks.

title: Aramco, Adnoc Sneak Oil Through Hormuz as Iran Menaces Strait
title_cn: 伊朗威胁海峡，沙特阿美和阿布扎比国家石油公司通过霍尔木兹海峡偷运石油
summary: Saudi Arabia’s Aramco Trading Co. and the UAE’s state oil company Adnoc are among firms that have moved crude cargoes through the Strait of Hormuz since Iran effectively closed the waterway, according to people familiar with the situation.

title: BlackRock's Rieder Says Equities Aren't in a Bubble, Fed on Hold
title_cn: 贝莱德的里德表示股市并未出现泡沫，美联储按兵不动
summary: Rick Rieder, BlackRock's CIO of global fixed income, says US equities are not in a bubble because of capital expenditures and earnings growth on "Bloomberg Open Interest." (Source: Bloomberg)

title: US Jobs Data ‘Steady as It Goes,’ Says BlackRock’s Rosenberg
title_cn: 贝莱德的罗森伯格表示，美国就业数据“稳定”
summary: Jeffrey Rosenberg, portfolio manager of the Systemic Multi-Strategy Fund at BlackRock, reacts to the April US jobs report as he sees a trade-off in the data between a strong headline number and weakness in income. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Private Equity Taps Junk Market for Dividends as Exits Stall
title_cn: 私募股权退出垃圾股市场以获取股息
summary: Private equity firms are once again tapping the European junk debt market to pay themselves dividends as market volatility fueled by the Iran war and AI anxiety limits their ability to cash out.

title: Ukraine Says It Hit Two Major Oil Refineries in Russia Overnight
title_cn: 乌克兰称一夜之间袭击了俄罗斯的两家主要炼油厂
summary: Ukraine said it struck two major fuel-producing facilities and an oil pumping station in Russia, adding more pressure on the nation’s refinery runs that hit multi-year lows in April.

title: Fed Data Suggest Japan Sold US Debt Amid Intervention
title_cn: 美联储数据显示日本在干预期间出售美国国债
summary: The Federal Reserve’s custody holdings of Treasuries fell for the first time in a month at a time Japan was likely intervening to support its currency, with market participants debating whether the nation offloaded US securities to fund its yen purchases.

title: OnlyFans Sells 16% Stake Weeks After Death of Owner Radvinsky
title_cn: 所有者拉德文斯基去世几周后，OnlyFans 出售 16% 的股份
summary: OnlyFans, the platform best known for adult content, agreed to sell a minority stake to Architect Capital in a deal that values the British company at about $3.15 billion.

title: CoreWeave's Q1 Earnings Were 'Transformational,' CEO Says
title_cn: 首席执行官表示，CoreWeave 第一季度的盈利是“变革性的”
summary: CoreWeave CEO Michael Intrator characterizes the company's first-quarter earnings as transformational, highlighting strong performance across revenue and operating margins. Speaking on "Bloomberg Tech," Intrator emphasizes robust demand from existing AI-native and cloud customers, as well as new verticals such as trading and finance firms and robotics companies integrating AI at scale. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Harvard, Princeton Portals Disrupted by Canvas Service Hack
title_cn: 哈佛、普林斯顿门户网站因 Canvas 服务黑客攻击而中断
summary: Hackers briefly took down an online portal used by thousands of colleges around the world, disrupting services at institutions from Harvard and Princeton in the US to the University of Manchester in the UK and the Universidad del Desarrollo in Chile.

title: Akamai’s $1.8B AI Power Move
title_cn: Akamai 的 $1.8B AI 动力举措
summary: Akamai CEO Tom Leighton joined Bloomberg Open Interest to break down a massive $1.8B AI cloud deal. He explains why it signals a shift away from big tech hyperscalers and how edge computing is becoming essential for stopping AI-powered cyberattacks, cutting costs, and delivering faster performance. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Siemens Scores Win on EU Push to Streamline Industrial AI Rules
title_cn: 西门子在欧盟推动简化工业人工智能规则方面取得胜利
summary: Siemens AG and other European tech companies have made headway on reshaping regulation for artificial intelligence in the European Union they say is putting them behind rivals in the US and China.

title: Giant Data Center Project in Virginia Upended by Clerical Error
title_cn: 弗吉尼亚州巨型数据中心项目因文书错误而中断
summary: Developers bankrolled by two of the world’s biggest asset managers set their sights on building a massive data-center hub in Northern Virginia. A fight over newspaper advertising threw their plans into disarray.

title: Airbnb Boosts Annual Sales Outlook While Spending Picks Up
title_cn: Airbnb 在支出增加的同时提高了年度销售前景
summary: Airbnb Inc. boosted its annual forecast on robust bookings in the major markets in the Americas, while it posted a big jump in spending as part of an effort to diversify the business.

title: CoreWeave Shares Drop After Forecast Sparks Growth Fears
title_cn: 预测引发增长担忧后 CoreWeave 股价下跌
summary: CoreWeave Inc.’s shares dropped after the AI data center operator gave a disappointing forecast for the current quarter, sparking concerns about slowing growth at a time when the company is spending heavily to bolster its operations.

title: Summer Travel Is a Mess. The Points Guy Tells Us How to Hack It
title_cn: 夏季旅行一团糟。 Points Guy 告诉我们如何破解它
summary:
As summer travel ramps up, consumers are bracing for high gas prices, airport security mayhem, airlines going under and a raft of cancelled flights, while prices of hotels, car rentals and just about everything else seem to be steadily marching skyward.

The Points Guy founder Brian Kelly tells Stacey Vanek Smith and Max Chafkin to fear not. He joins a special Everybody's Business podcast recorded at an On Air Fest event to share a few tips for navigating this summer travel season. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Online Mob Fuels 6,000% Rally in Obscure SpaceX Rival AST SpaceMobile
title_cn: 在线暴民推动 SpaceX 竞争对手 AST SpaceMobile 股价上涨 6,000%
summary: A relatively unknown SpaceX rival has rallied 6,000%, powered by a mob of zealots and a stock guru known as the Kook. Sana Pashankar has more. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Cloudflare Drops on Sales Forecast Miss, AI-Linked Job Cuts
title_cn: Cloudflare 因销售预测失误、与 AI 相关的裁员而下跌
summary: Cloudflare Inc. shares fell after the company said it would slash jobs and gave a forecast for revenue that fell short of analysts’ expectations.

title: US Said to Suspect Nvidia Chips Smuggled to Alibaba Via Thailand
title_cn: 美国怀疑英伟达芯片经泰国走私至阿里巴巴
summary: A key company behind Thailand’s national AI effort is suspected of helping to smuggle billions of dollars worth of Super Micro Computer Inc. servers containing advanced Nvidia Corp. chips to China, with Alibaba Group Holding Ltd. one of multiple end customers, according to people familiar with the matter.

title: Poor Equity Returns, Weak Rupee Drive Indians to Foreign Shores
title_cn: 股市回报不佳、卢比疲软迫使印度人流向外国海岸
summary: Investors in India, long focused almost entirely on domestic markets, are increasingly starting to look outward.

title: ‘Peak Euphoria’ Seen as Small Companies Jump on the AI Bandwagon
title_cn: 小公司纷纷加入人工智能浪潮，“欣喜若狂”
summary: A tiny pharmaceutical company in danger of being delisted from the Nasdaq stock exchange went from celebrating new patents for cancer treatments to re-branding as an AI company in the period of two months. The move rescued its share price in the process, albeit briefly.

title: Hunt for AI Optical Winners Drives Rally in Two Swiss Stocks
title_cn: 寻找人工智能光学赢家推动两只瑞士股票上涨
summary: European investors chasing AI winners have turned to Switzerland, sending shares of two optical component makers sharply higher this week.

title: AI Startup Monk Offers a Year’s Rent for One Good Recruiting Tip
title_cn: AI 初创公司 Monk 提供一年租金以获得一个好的招聘技巧
summary: The company is making a creative pitch to find engineers in a highly competitive market

title: Box Makers Struggle to Pass on War Costs as Demand Stays Weak
title_cn: 由于需求持续疲软，盒子制造商努力转嫁战争成本
summary: Packaging producers can’t catch a break as the conflict in the Middle East deals the latest blow to the industry’s protracted downturn.

title: Black Eyed Peas Co-Founder will.i.am Is Also an AI Evangelist
title_cn: 黑眼豆豆联合创始人 will.i.am 也是人工智能布道者
summary: Black Eyed Peas co-founder will.i.am has a message for young people worried that artificial intelligence will make it hard for them to get jobs: embrace the technology, he says, and make it work for you.

title: Trump Wants to Make H-1B Workers More Expensive for US Employers
title_cn: 特朗普希望让 H-1B 工人对美国雇主来说更加昂贵
summary: An entry‑level software engineer in San Francisco would need to be paid $162,000 a year to qualify for an H‑1B visa under a Trump administration proposal — almost 30% more than today. In Dallas, the minimum would jump by a similar rate to $113,000 and in New York to $132,000.

title: Coinbase Resumes Trading After Seven-Hour Exchange Outage
title_cn: Coinbase 在交易所中断七小时后恢复交易
summary: Crypto exchange Coinbase Global Inc. said trading services had resumed after a significant outage left customers unable to transact on its platform for almost seven hours on Friday, rounding off a difficult week at the company.

title: Intel CEO Who Won Over Trump and Musk Now Needs a Breakthrough
title_cn: 赢得特朗普和马斯克支持的英特尔首席执行官现在需要突破
summary: After Lip-Bu Tan became chief executive officer of Intel Corp. in March of last year, the struggling company’s shares went nowhere for seven months while the chipmaker was getting trounced in the market for artificial intelligence.

title: SoftBank Cuts Target for OpenAI Margin Loan by 40%
title_cn: 软银将 OpenAI 保证金贷款目标下调 40%
summary: SoftBank is scaling back plans for a $10 billion margin loan backed by its OpenAI stake after creditors voiced some hesitation. Matthew Bloxham of Bloomberg Intelligence has more. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Ex-Hedge Fund Adviser Bets on AI-Backed Consultancy for Rich
title_cn: 前对冲基金顾问押注于人工智能支持的富人咨询服务
summary: When Tony Cowell retired in 2023 from a three-decade career advising private equity and hedge funds from the Cayman Islands at KPMG LLP, AI was still relatively nascent.

title: Baidu’s Chip Unit Plans Dual IPO in Shanghai and Hong Kong
title_cn: 百度芯片部门计划在上海和香港双重IPO
summary: Baidu Inc.’s chip unit Kunlunxin is planning an initial public offering on Shanghai’s Nasdaq-style bourse in addition to a separate listing plan in Hong Kong as the Chinese search engine giant looks to taps investor appetite for semiconductor stocks.

title: Waymo vs Wayve: The Self-Driving Showdown Coming to London
title_cn: Waymo vs Wayve：自动驾驶对决即将来到伦敦
summary:
Waymo leads with sensors and maps. Wayve bets on pure AI and scale. Both are launching in London—who wins the future of driving? 
Bloomberg's Tom Mackenzie reports (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Autonomous Driving Showdown: Who Will Win the Self-Driving Race? | Bloomberg Tech: Europe 5/08/2026
title_cn: 自动驾驶对决：谁将赢得自动驾驶竞赛？ |彭博科技：欧洲 2026 年 5 月 8 日
summary:
In this episode of Bloomberg Tech: Europe, Bloomberg’s Tom Mackenzie explores the accelerating race for autonomous driving. From Waymo’s sensor-driven precision to Wayve’s mapless, end-to-end AI approach, the battle for the future of mobility is intensifying. Which model will win out? We also hear from BYD, examine Vay’s vision for driverless transport, and see how Einride is reshaping freight with autonomous, electric trucks.  Who will lead the driverless future?

"Bloomberg Tech: Europe" spotlights the biggest names and trends shaping the region's technology ecosystem as the global competition heats up. This monthly, 30-minute magazine-style show features in-depth interviews with top technology leaders, as well as major investors and policymakers - giving you a compelling A to Z of the most consequential innovations, opportunities and challenges.  (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Sony Announces $3 Billion Buyback as Memory Prices Take Toll
title_cn: 内存价格下跌索尼宣布 30 亿美元回购
summary: Sony Group Corp. said it will buy back as much as ¥500 billion ($3.2 billion) of its shares after rising memory prices weighed on the entertainment group’s annual outlook.

title: Sony Partners With TSMC in Effort to Rein in Chipmaking Costs
title_cn: 索尼与台积电合作，努力控制芯片制造成本
summary: Sony Group Corp. plans a new joint venture with Taiwan Semiconductor Manufacturing Co. as the first step toward what it called a fab-light approach to semiconductor production.

title: Farage’s Reform Surges in Bruising Election for Starmer’s Labour
title_cn: 法拉奇的改革在斯塔默工党的选举中激增
summary: Prime Minister Keir Starmer said he had no plans to step aside as Labour leader after early results in local elections showed Nigel Farage’s populist Reform UK racking up sweeping gains over Britain’s governing party.

title: Does the UK Really Want to Change PMs Now?
title_cn: 英国现在真的想更换首相吗？
summary: With all this global uncertainty, how can Keir Starmer maintain Labour’s position? Bloomberg Opinion columnist Rosa Prince explains. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Labour Facing Defeat in Wales as Reform and Plaid Cymru Surge
title_cn: 随着改革和格子西姆鲁的兴起，威尔士工党面临失败
summary: Labour faces a heavy defeat in the elections for the Welsh assembly, in what would be a historic loss for Keir Starmer’s governing party in a part of the country there they’ve come out on top for more than a century.

title: Trump’s Anger at Germany Hangs Over EU Push to Ratify Trade Deal
title_cn: 欧盟推动批准贸易协议，特朗普对德国的愤怒挥之不去
summary: Donald Trump’s rift with Friedrich Merz is complicating the European Union’s push to finish its US trade deal before fresh tariffs arrive.

title: Bitcoin Campaign to Force SNB Holdings Has Failed, Reuters Says
title_cn: 路透社称，迫使瑞士央行控股的比特币运动失败了
summary: Swiss crypto campaigners have abandoned a bid to require the central bank to hold Bitcoin after failing to collect enough signatures to trigger a plebiscite, Reuters reported.

title: London Offers a Snapshot of an Increasingly Ungovernable UK
title_cn: 伦敦展现了英国日益失控的一面
summary: The map of English councils was lighting up in a murky gray on Friday, as more and more town halls returned a divided composition that spells budget paralysis in the future.

title: NYC Tax Plan That Angered Rich Is Proving Difficult to Design
title_cn: 纽约市税收计划被证明很难设计，激怒了富人
summary: New York officials are trying to give shape to the pied-à-terre tax proposed by Governor Kathy Hochul, with significant questions about how the levy would work still unresolved amid broader Democratic discord over the state budget.

title: Ramaphosa’s Future in Doubt as Impeachment Risk Resurfaces
title_cn: 弹劾风险再次浮现，拉马福萨的未来存疑
summary: South African President Cyril Ramaphosa’s future hangs in the balance after the country’s top court revived an inquiry into a burglary at his farm that he was accused of covering up.

title: Virginia’s Top Court Blocks Democrats’ New Congressional Map
title_cn: 弗吉尼亚州最高法院阻止民主党新国会地图
summary: The Virginia Supreme Court blocked a new congressional map approved by state voters that was poised to help Democrats gain additional US House seats, giving Republicans an important victory after a year of redistricting efforts had largely ended in a stalemate.

title: Rubio Expects Iran to Respond Friday to Peace Proposal
title_cn: 卢比奥预计伊朗周五将对和平提议做出回应
summary: Iran “should” provide a response on Friday to the US proposal to end the war, Secretary of State Marco Rubio says. He spoke to reporters in Rome after meeting with Italian Prime Minister Giorgia Meloni. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: How to Spot a Russian Deepfake
title_cn: 如何识别俄罗斯 Deepfake
summary: Russia-based groups have been found to be spreading disinformation for decades. Now a new one is capitalizing on AI to more effectively sow doubt and chaos. Bloomberg Investigates reports on Storm-1516. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: BOE Governor Says UK Needs Closer EU Ties in a Superpower Age
title_cn: 英国央行行长表示英国需要在超级大国时代与欧盟建立更紧密的关系
summary: Bank of England Governor Andrew Bailey called for a rebuilding of trade relations with Europe, warning that Britain needs allies in a world dominated by competing superpowers.

title: Pentagon Releases Declassified UFO Files on Government Website
title_cn: 五角大楼在政府网站上发布解密的不明飞行物文件
summary: The Pentagon announced that it has begun releasing government files on UFOs after President Donald Trump directed agencies to identify and declassify them.

title: Hassett, Asked on Gundlach Debt Idea, Says Not in Million Years
title_cn: 哈塞特在被问及冈拉克债务想法时表示，数百万年内不会
summary: White House National Economic Council Director Kevin Hassett suggested that investor Jeffrey Gundlach’s scenario for a type of restructuring of US Treasury securities would amount to a default, and rejected any such move.

title: Jobs Report Should Not Cause Fed to Hike Rates, Hassett Says
title_cn: 哈塞特表示，就业报告不应导致美联储加息
summary: White House National Economic Council Director Kevin Hassett says the April jobs report should not make the Federal Reserve want to raise interest rates.  He also talks about bringing down the national debt and President Trump's trip to China next week. He speaks on Bloomberg Open Interest.  (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Trump’s Latest 10% Tariffs Found Unlawful by US Trade Court
title_cn: 美国贸易法庭认定特朗普最新 10% 关税非法
summary: President Donald Trump’s 10% global tariffs were declared unlawful by a federal trade court in a fresh blow to the administration’s economic agenda, just months after the US Supreme Court vacated earlier levies he’d imposed.

title: Ukraine Ramps Up Drone Strikes Ahead of Moscow’s Parade
title_cn: 乌克兰在莫斯科阅兵前加强无人机袭击
summary: Ukraine conducted heavy overnight drone attacks on Russia, giving no indication that Kyiv is ready to observe Moscow’s self-declared ceasefire despite threats of retaliation if Victory Day celebrations on Red Square are disrupted.

title: The Labour Contenders Who Could Replace a Weakened Starmer
title_cn: 谁可以取代实力较弱的斯塔默的工党竞争者
summary: Doubts about Keir Starmer’s future as prime minister have fed months of plots and paranoia within the Labour Party about who, if anyone, might be ready to take his place. A bad set of results in the UK’s local elections could trigger more speculation.

title: NYC Moves Closer to Enacting Rent Freeze Promised by Mamdani
title_cn: 纽约市距离实施马姆达尼承诺的租金冻结又近了一步
summary: New York City’s Rent Guidelines Board voted to set a 0% to 2% range for rent increases for roughly one million stabilized apartments, putting Mayor Zohran Mamdani’s pledged freeze within reach.

title: Denmark’s Coalition Talks Break Down in Blow to Frederiksen
title_cn: 丹麦联合政府谈判破裂对弗雷德里克森造成打击
summary: Denmark’s caretaker Prime Minister Mette Frederiksen suffered a setback in her bid for a third term after more than six weeks of coalition-building talks hit an impasse.

title: Chile Hit by Biggest Consumer Price Jump Since 2022 on Fuel Surge
title_cn: 燃料激增导致智利消费者价格出现 2022 年以来最大涨幅
summary: Chile’s consumer prices in April posted the biggest monthly jump since 2022, reflecting the brunt of of President José Antonio Kast’s decision to let fuel costs surge after the onset of the Middle East war.

title: Rubio Vows Vatican Cooperation in Fence-Mending Trip to Italy
title_cn: 卢比奥誓言梵蒂冈将在意大利修墙之行中进行合作
summary: US Secretary of State Marco Rubio said the US would maintain military pressure on Iran and vowed to continue working with the Vatican, capping a two-day trip meant to shore up ties after a recent spat with Pope Leo XIV.

title: Mali Rejects Talks With Jihadists Amid Regional Spillover Fears
title_cn: 由于担心地区蔓延，马里拒绝与圣战分子会谈
summary: Mali’s junta ruled out any negotiations with Islamist-militant groups and reaffirmed a hardline stance on security, as regional leaders warn that escalating violence in the Sahel region risks spreading.

title: Russia’s Budget Gap Widens to Record Despite Oil Revenue Boost
title_cn: 尽管石油收入增加，俄罗斯预算缺口仍扩大至创纪录水平
summary: Russia’s budget gap widened to a record despite a jump in oil revenue amid heightened tensions in the Middle East.

title: US Adds 115,000 Jobs in April, Unemployment Rate Holds
title_cn: 美国4月新增就业岗位11.5万个，失业率保持不变
summary: US employers added 115,000 jobs in April, marking the first back-to-back advance in nearly a year, and the unemployment rate remained unchanged at 4.3%. Bloomberg's Michael McKee has our first read on the report.  (Source: Bloomberg)

title: UK Bonds Rally as Starmer Says He’ll Stay as Prime Minister
title_cn: 斯塔默表示将继续担任首相，英国债券上涨
summary: UK government bonds rallied as Prime Minister Keir Starmer vowed to remain in his job despite his party’s election losses.

title: French Far Right Slams Probe That Clouds Election Prospects
title_cn: 法国极右翼猛烈抨击给选举前景蒙上阴影的调查
summary: The National Rally’s Marine Le Pen said an investigation into her party’s leader, Jordan Bardella, is part of an attempt to puncture his popularity as the far-right duo prepare for France’s presidential election a year from now.

title: Modi’s Party Names Adhikari as West Bengal’s Chief Minister
title_cn: 莫迪政党任命阿迪卡里为西孟加拉邦首席部长
summary: Indian Prime Minister Narendra Modi’s party named Suvendu Adhikari as West Bengal’s chief minister, even as its landslide election victory in the key eastern state has triggered debate over a controversial voter roll revision.
